positioning.oneSentence: GCA is the access token for the Go China narrative: a China-facing Web3 intelligence community with live account intake, read-only wallet verification, and a staged non-custodial quant research access layer.
positioning.chineseOneSentence: GCA 是 Go China Access 的访问代币，连接中文 Web3 叙事、市场情报、风险教育和非托管量化研究工具。
positioning.publicThesis: China-facing Web3 narrative plus risk-first access to reports, backtests, warnings, signal review, position sizing, education, and member workflows.

narrativeStack.name: Go China Narrative
narrativeStack.description: China-facing Web3 culture, market attention, bilingual research, and community energy.

narrativeStack.name: Go China Access
narrativeStack.description: GCA as the access token for the public story and planned service workflows.

narrativeStack.name: AI Quant Access
narrativeStack.description: A staged product layer for non-custodial market research, backtests, account-level credits, and risk tools.

narrativeStack.name: Risk First Trading
narrativeStack.description: No custody, no withdrawal permission, no outcome promise, and no bypassing risk gates.

safeClaims: GCA is building a concept-stage access layer around Go China Access, China Narrative Radar, and planned non-custodial quant research utility.
GCA can be described as an access and membership token for reports, credits, education, and research workflows.
The controlled account UI, read-only GCA balance verification, eligible credit records, and member ledger records are live or ledger-ready.
The official public market route is the Base Mainnet Uniswap v4 GCA/USDT pool.
No third-party audit has been completed.
doNotClaim: deep liquidity before visible liquidity exists
external audit completion before an independent report is published
BaseScan token profile approval before BaseScan publishes it
security-vendor approval, permanent warning-free status, or cross-wallet warning removal before vendor/current wallet UI confirms it
finished trading or research platform utility before service modules are released
cash, income, reimbursement, trading permission, or risk-control bypass from credits, member status, or the planned 10,000 GCA member benefit
